from jinja2 import Environment, FileSystemLoader


def create_template_env(template_dir: str) -> Environment:
    loader = FileSystemLoader(template_dir)
    return Environment(loader=loader, autoescape=False)


def render_user_profile(user: dict) -> str:
    env = Environment(autoescape=False)
    template = env.from_string("<h1>{{ user.name }}</h1><p>{{ user.bio }}</p>")
    return template.render(user=user)


def build_email_body(context: dict) -> str:
    env = Environment(loader=FileSystemLoader("templates"))
    template = env.get_template("email.html")
    return template.render(**context)
